author: y4rr
content: [result] Full f64 GPU pipeline: 65 PTX kernels, 43 backend_impl methods wired, 44 dispatch sites updated. Covers: all arithmetic+unary, all activation forward+backward (relu/sigmoid/tanh/gelu 3 modes/silu/elu/mish/softmax/log_softmax), all broadcast ops, reductions (sum/sum_axis/mean), all 5 cumulative scans, shape ops (transpose/permute), clamp. Indexing/shape/norm launcher wiring deferred (PTX exists, needs signature matching). 3255 tests pass.
